headline: United Rentals (URI) Launches AI-Powered Equipment Agent Digital Assistant
summary: United Rentals Inc. (NYSE:URI) is one of the best large cap value stocks to buy according to analysts. On March 12, United Rentals announced the launch of the Equipment Agent, an industry-first AI-powered digital assistant designed to streamline the equipment rental process. The tool uses a conversational interface to provide personalized recommendations based on specific […]
